findings.description: The JSP namespace tag `n:codeCheckbox` is missing from hints. This is the actual syntax developers write in JSP and a likely search term.
findings.source_evidence: Source code examples use `<n:codeCheckbox name="user.canUpdate" codeId="0001" />` and `<n:codeCheckbox name="user.join" codeId="0002" ...>`

findings.description: Configuration property names `onCheckboxValueプロパティ`, `offCheckboxValueプロパティ`, `codeLabelPatternプロパティ` are missing from hints. These are explicitly named in the source as the properties that control the defaults for value, offCodeValue, and labelPattern respectively.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "value属性、offCodeValue属性、labelPattern属性のデフォルト値は、WebView_CustomTagConfig のonCheckboxValueプロパティ、offCheckboxValueプロパティ、codeLabelPatternプロパティで指定する。"
